channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Scientists shielding farming from climate change need more public funding. But they're getting less
item.description: Public funding for agricultural research in the U.S. has been declining for the last two decades, a process Trump has rapidly accelerated by freezing or pausing support for a variety of research programs financed by the USDA, EPA and other organizations.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Five Kink and LGBT Apps Exposed Sensitive User Images - Risks Remain for Thousands
item.description: Five dating apps exposed explicit images due to a security lapse by the developer M.A.D Mobile, putting 800,000-900,000 users at risk of blackmail and extortion.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: Fire at Tesla dealership near Rome destroys 17 cars
item.description: Rome’s fire service said it was investigating “all avenues” while looking into how the fire started, but it did not rule out arson.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com, The Mercury News

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 12 formas de acelerar la transformación digital
item.description: Los directores ejecutivos valoran la transformación y la reinvención, ya que las consideran esenciales para la competitividad actual y futura. Pero una transformación y una reinvención exitosas ya no son suficientes, dicen los altos ejecutivos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La guerra cultural de la IA: los sesgos ocultos en los modelos de entrenamiento pueden impulsar la propaganda política
item.description: El lanzamiento del DeepSeek, de fabricación china, ha generado un acalorado debate, aunque los críticos han ignorado en gran medida un enorme problema: la posibilidad de que China utilice un modelo de IA de este tipo para impulsar una agenda cultural y política en el resto del mundo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Modernize enterprise PC fleets to ensure AI ambitions deliver business success
item.description: Investing in the right kind of PCs helps businesses innovate, become more secure and adapt to new ways of working. They also ensure that enterprises have a foundation from which to implement crucial AI-driven improvements that can boost productivity and growth.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple, Meta face modest fines as EU seeks to avoid US spat
item.description: Apple Inc. and Meta Platforms Inc. are set to be hit by fines under the European Union's Big Tech competition rulebook toward the end of next week, with the iPhone maker facing the added threat of recurring penalties under the bloc's Digital Markets Act.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Nikola founder says he was pardoned by Trump
item.description: Nikola founder Trevor Milton said Thursday that President Trump pardoned him for his 2022 conviction of misleading investors about the electric vehicle maker's technology.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Musk: Trump will 'go after' people 'pushing the lies' about Tesla
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk suggested Thursday that the Trump administration will crack down on vehicle vandalization, expressing his concerns about protesters targeting Tesla dealerships across the U.S. and abroad.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: La transformación digital, esencial para la supervivencia del sector asegurador
item.description: Los beneficios de la transformación digital ya son palpables para el sector asegurador. Así lo constata el informe Perspectivas de tecnología en seguros 2025: transformando la innovación en ventaja competitiva que firma Concentrix.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Signal chat discussion of 'clearly classified' information violated law, experts say
item.description: The inadvertent inclusion of a journalist on a Signal group chat discussing attack plans means officials likely violated the Espionage Act and public records laws while flouting guidance on how to discuss sensitive information.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why Tesla may be spared from Trump’s auto tariffs
item.description: As the global auto world reeled from the potential fallout of Donald Trump‘s new auto tariffs, one name stood out as less affected than others—electric-vehicle maker Tesla. The Texas-based company’s shares were the rare automotive stock to trade in the green in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: With the rise of genAI, it’s time to follow Apple’s Security Recommendations
item.description: Apple’s Safari browser has a really useful password management feature, which is now also available as a standalone app called Passwords.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Former Arista COO launches NextHop AI for customized networking infrastructure
item.description: A new player in the networking industry is tackling the unique challenges of AI infrastructure at hyperscale.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DOGE staffer allegedly ran company providing services to hacking group
item.description: US Department of Government Efficiency tech advisor Edward Coristine previously ran a small infrastructure provider that offered services to a cybercriminal group, it has been alleged.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Apple rumor machine cranks into gear for iOS 19
item.description: WWDC event marketing intensifies, and as we head toward that event in a little over two months, it looks as if we’re being told to expect a new paint job (aka user interface change)s for iOS.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: No application can eliminate human error: Signal’s head defends the app
item.description: When the editor-in-chief of The Atlantic, Jeff Goldberg, was accidentally added to a Signal conversation, things took a surprising turn.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Databricks’ TAO method to allow LLM training with unlabeled data
item.description: Data lakehouse provider Databricks has unveiled a new large language model (LLM) training method, TAO that will allow enterprises to train models without labeling data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5
